name: Caramel-Cream Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine caramels and 1/2 cup milk. Cook over low heat until caramels are melted and mixture is smooth. Set aside.
2. Spread remaining caramel mixture in the unbaked pie shell. Reserve 2 tablespoons for topping.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Add 1 egg, 1 tablespoon sugar, and vanilla. Beat until fluffy.
4. Pour cream cheese mixture over caramel layer in the pie shell.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes or until just set.
6. Meanwhile, stir pumpkin, remaining egg, 1/3 cup sugar, cinnamon, salt, ginger, and cloves in a mixing bowl until smooth. Stir in 3/4 cup milk.
7. Carefully spoon the pumpkin mixture over the cream cheese layer.
8. Cover edge of pie with foil. Bake for 20 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake about 20 more minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
11. In a small mixing bowl, beat whipping cream and 2 tablespoons sugar until soft peaks form. Spoon dollops of whipped cream on top of pie and drizzle with reserved caramel mixture. Makes 8 servings.
